chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-574 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025. Mr. Irfan Ali, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional P.G for the State a/w Inspector Siraj Ahmed on behalf of SSP, Tando Muhammad Khan and SIP Mumtaz Ali (SHO PS Abadgar). ***************************************** Pursuant to notice, SSP Tando Muhammad Khan, SSP Dadu, SHO PS Abadgar and SHO PS Khudabad, District Dadu filed their replies / comments / reports, wherein they have undertaken to provide legal protection to the Petitioner. Learned A.P.G present in Court submits that official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioner within four corners of law. At this juncture, Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the Petition in said terms. In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to concerned SHO(s) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioners, as and when approached. However, it is made clear that this order shall not affect proceedings already pending against the Petitioner before the competent Court(s) of law. JUDGE Ali.
